Lumify
Table of Contents

Namespace lumify.api.Hubs

Classes

ChatHub

SignalR hub for real-time chat and user presence. Tracks each user's active connections via the presence service, broadcasts presence changes to all clients, and handles joining rooms, leaving rooms and sending messages. Requires an authenticated connection.

EventHub

SignalR hub for real-time calendar event updates within a workspace. Clients join the group of a workspace to receive its live events (EventCreated, EventUpdated, EventDeleted) broadcast by the EventsController. Requires an authenticated connection.

NoteHub

SignalR hub for real-time folder and note updates within a workspace. Clients join the group of a workspace to receive its live events (e.g. NoteCreated, NoteUpdated, NoteDeleted, FolderCreated, …) broadcast by the NotesController and FoldersController. Requires an authenticated connection.

TodoHub

SignalR hub for real-time todo list/entry updates within a workspace. Clients join the group of a workspace to receive its live events (TodoListCreated, TodoListUpdated, TodoEntryCreated, TodoEntryUpdated, …) broadcast by the TodoListsController. Requires an authenticated connection.

UserIdProvider

Maps the custom UserID claim to the SignalR user identifier, so that Clients.User(userID) targets all of a user's active hub connections.

WorkspaceHub

SignalR hub for real-time workspace and membership updates. Unlike the other workspace hubs, clients join a group keyed by their own user ID (a user can belong to many workspaces), so the WorkspaceController can push events such as WorkspaceCreated, WorkspaceUpdated, WorkspaceDeleted, WorkspaceMemberAdded and WorkspaceMemberRemoved to every affected member. Requires an authenticated connection.

Made with docfx
